parsed_output.justification: Hunter reveals that he knows 'for a fact' which center card is a werewolf. According to the rules, only the Seer or a lone Werewolf (who is permitted to look at a center card if they are the only one) could have this information. Since Jacob already claimed the Seer role, Hunter's knowledge strongly indicates that he is the lone Werewolf in the game.
